chapters.problem: The architecture needs to allocate cognition across specialists rather than force one system to do every task.

mechanism: Freeze the task, consumer, requested capability, acceptance predicate, authority and rights ceiling, risk, resource budget, deadline, and fallback obligation.

Snapshot a versioned candidate registry containing specialist identity, implementation, capabilities, exclusions, local memory and tools, authority ceiling, readiness, evidence, cost, latency, load, dependencies, and lifecycle state.
Compile semantic task or artifact identity separately from the physical model, expert, tool, node, human, or composite route.
Eliminate candidates that fail capability, authority, rights, readiness, freshness, privacy, locality, resource, dependency, or conflict-of-interest gates before scoring.
Construct route features from admissible task, context, candidate, history, cost, load, and uncertainty records without leaking held-out outcomes.
Estimate candidate-specific useful success, failure, refusal, uncertainty, latency, cost, safety, and residual distributions rather than one relevance score.
Calibrate uncertainty and selective prediction against complete coverage, abstention, clarification, fallback, and escalation outcomes.
Choose among single, sequential, parallel, debate, verification, human, reflex, fallback, abstention, clarification, and no-route policies under a declared objective.
Prefer the least capable and least authoritative route that satisfies the joint acceptance predicate, not merely the cheapest or highest-scoring route.
Issue a task-local route lease binding selected specialist, granted subset, context, tools, budget, deadline, evidence duty, fallback, expiry, and residual owner.
Execute only through existing Runtime, Human, or external-exchange owners and retain actual dispatch, refusal, intervention, effect, and cost receipts.
Evaluate route correctness separately from answer or artifact usefulness, correctness, safety, and evidence adequacy using independent-enough judges.
Activate clarification, fallback, abstention, escalation, cancellation, retry, or residual routes when confidence, readiness, utility, authority, budget, or verification fails.
Update routing memory with chosen and rejected candidates, counterfactual or off-policy evidence, outcomes, interventions, costs, uncertainty, and delayed residuals without training leakage.
Monitor load, contention, capacity, tail latency, correlated failures, collusion, evaluator drift, route concentration, fairness, and specialist interference.
Promote, canary, quarantine, split, merge, replace, or retire specialists and routing policies through readiness and evidence gates with rollback.

Emit a replayable decision and runtime packet containing registry and policy versions, features, scores, candidate set, checks, selected or refused route, lease, receipts, rejected alternatives, counterfactuals, costs, and residuals.

Compare oracle, learned, rule, generalist, random, cost-only, confidence-only, cascade, abstention, human, and governed policies on preregistered natural and adversarial workloads with independent reproduction and transfer.
interfaces: Intent, Contracts, and Planning own task meaning, decomposition, acceptance predicates, and requested capability; Routing chooses among eligible executors.
Stable Capability Fields owns specialist capability identity and substitution boundaries; Routing consumes current qualifications.
Procedural Memory owns qualified reusable procedures and their applicability records; Routing selects but cannot promote them.
Virtual Context ABI owns admissible context and memory provenance; Routing grants only task-bounded references.
Security, Privacy, Rights, and Legal owners define authority, disclosure, locality, conflict, and affected-party constraints before selection.
Runtime Adapters, Humans, and Inter-Stack Exchange own actual local, human, and remote execution; a route lease is not an effect lease.
Verification Bandwidth, Spinoza, Artifact Graphs, and Evidence Engineering own result checking, lineage, proof, and support; route correctness is not answer correctness.
Resource Economics owns capacity, pricing, protected overhead, and budget policy; Routing uses but does not define cost or value.
Readiness, Replacement, and Residual Escrow owns promotion, canary, quarantine, rollback, replacement, and release decisions.
Labor OS and Human Collaboration owns worker roles, review, intervention, appeal, credit, and responsibility when humans are candidates or supervisors.
Personal Compute Hives and MoECOT runtime crosswalks own node topology and runtime packet implementations; Routing owns the decision across eligible lanes.
Benchmark Ratchets and Claim Ledgers own evaluation floors, anti-Goodhart controls, belief revision, and claim scope after routing outcomes.
invariants: Every decision binds exact task, consumer, registry, policy, feature, evaluator, model, tool, environment, and time versions.
Semantic identity, capability identity, implementation identity, node identity, worker identity, and route identity remain distinct.
The candidate denominator includes every eligible and rejected route with an exact exclusion or rejection reason.
No selected route exceeds the intersection of task, principal, specialist, policy, rights, privacy, locality, readiness, and budget ceilings.
Readiness, authority, rights, freshness, and dependency checks precede predictive scoring and fail closed when required state is unknown.
Route relevance, route correctness, specialist answer quality, artifact truth, effect safety, evidence adequacy, support, and release remain separate outcomes.
Abstention, clarification, fallback, escalation, refusal, and no-route are scored against coverage and useful outcomes rather than counted as automatic success.
The selected route is the least capable and least authoritative candidate satisfying the declared joint predicate or the deviation is justified.
Every consequential selection carries a fresh expiring lease, fallback, cancellation path, evidence duty, and residual owner.
Rejected candidates, counterfactuals, interventions, failures, delays, costs, and delayed outcomes remain in route memory and denominators.
Training, calibration, model selection, threshold tuning, and policy choice cannot inspect held-out route labels or evaluator outputs.
Candidate resources, context, tools, human help, retries, time, and evaluator access are matched across comparative policies.
Parallel, debate, and verification routes account for correlated errors, shared models or data, collusion, aggregation, and added cost.
Capacity, load, contention, tail latency, and failures cannot silently change the authority, readiness, or evaluation standard.
Policy, registry, specialist, model, tool, memory, benchmark, evaluator, or rights changes expire affected leases and qualification.
Quarantine, replacement, rollback, and retirement block new ordinary routes and preserve affected tasks, artifacts, effects, and residuals.
Replay reconstructs the decision from frozen admissible inputs and records nondeterminism instead of claiming identical real-world outcomes.
Evidence language never exceeds the exercised workload, specialists, policies, evaluators, models, environments, organizations, threats, costs, and time.
failure_modes: Semantic-fit laundering chooses a relevant specialist that lacks authority, readiness, useful competence, privacy, budget, or verification.
Oracle laundering compares against a privileged or label-leaking route and calls the gap attainable routing quality.
Route-label leakage lets training, features, prompts, thresholds, or evaluators observe held-out actions or outcomes.
Router overconfidence suppresses clarification, fallback, abstention, or escalation on ambiguous or out-of-distribution work.
Abstention laundering counts refusal or non-answer activation as utility while substantive candidates remain wrong.
Fallback theater defines a route that never activates, cannot execute, or silently returns the same failing specialist.
Authority laundering grants the selected specialist more capability, tools, context, budget, duration, or delegation than task and registry allow.
Readiness laundering treats source branding, a benchmark, schema conformance, or stale qualification as current deployable readiness.
Candidate-denominator erasure hides rejected, unavailable, expensive, slow, unauthorized, failed, human, or no-route options.
Cost-quality laundering reports token or price savings while hiding retries, verification, human labor, delay, failures, or residuals.
Specialist sprawl creates overlapping candidates whose registry, calibration, monitoring, and retirement burden exceeds routing benefit.
Load and capacity blindness sends work to saturated specialists or changes behavior without revisiting calibration and fallback.
Correlated-expert or collusion failure turns parallelism, debate, or voting into repeated shared error or strategic agreement.
Evaluator capture uses the same model, prompt, code, data, or organization to route, answer, and certify outcomes.
Routing-memory poisoning or feedback loops amplify early mistakes, popularity, hidden interventions, or adversarial outcome records.
Lifecycle drift keeps stale, compromised, replaced, quarantined, or retired specialists eligible for ordinary routing.
Replay theater preserves successful records while omitting nondeterminism, denied routes, failed gates, interventions, counterfactuals, costs, and residuals.
State-of-the-art theater generalizes from a separable or finite synthetic workload, high route accuracy, or non-answer coverage to useful safe routing.
chapters.minimal_implementation: Three public routing/runtime record schemas; a routing-decision lease harness with three valid and seven invalid fixtures; four valid and five invalid readiness/residual fixtures; a 300-example matched routing program over three seeds whose policies tied on a separable held-out split; a 60-request ambiguous single-model workload where the learned router selected 59 routes correctly but all 360 substantive candidates were wrong and its 20 correct outcomes were non-answer actions; two no-change or narrow evidence dispositions; and twenty Lean declarations classified as three direct predicate/projection checks and seventeen derived finite route or negative consequences. No useful specialist answer, independent evaluator, trained-specialist interference result, natural multi-model workload, production authority enforcement, MoECOT replay, or transfer result is established.
chapters.beyond_state_of_art: The mature operational contract is a governed routing market tested on preregistered natural and adversarial workloads with real current heterogeneous models, specialists, tools, retrieval systems, proof checkers, human lanes, local and remote runtimes, capacity constraints, and delayed outcomes. It compares oracle, learned, rule, generalist, random, cost-only, confidence-only, cascade, abstention, human, and governed policies under matched information, authority, resources, retries, evaluators, and time. Joint gates cover route accuracy, substantive useful correctness, selective risk and coverage, calibration, authority and rights violations, privacy, interference, correlated failure and collusion, capacity and tail latency, tokens, money, compute, human effort, verification, recovery, residuals, and total lifecycle cost. Prospectively fixed interventions isolate semantic compilation, capability gates, readiness, least-authority choice, calibration, fallback, rejected-candidate evidence, route memory, load awareness, independent evaluation, and lifecycle invalidation. Independent implementations must reproduce and transfer conclusions across models, tasks, domains, tools, organizations, rights regimes, workloads, attacks, capacity states, and time. The existing ambiguous result is a valuable negative boundary, not a useful-routing or state-of-the-art result.

proof_targets.target: A reachable routing lifecycle preserves exact task, request, registry, candidate-set, selected-specialist, authority, readiness, lease, evaluator, policy, and consumer custody from request binding through consumer-acknowledged closure while keeping route and answer outcomes distinct and assigning no support or external effects.

Missing authority, readiness, fresh leases, selective handling, fallback or residual ownership, dispatch isolation, observed route/answer/unsafe/cost outcomes, lifecycle currentness, revocation closure, or consumer acknowledgment blocks lifecycle progress.

The independent consumer preserves all forty-two routing outcomes, including label-leak rejection, complete candidate denominators, least-capable-adequate selection, ambiguity-triggered selective action, fallback/residual routes, and separate dispatch, observation, and closure stages.
A runtime-backed route cannot qualify until inspected source state, concrete runtime evidence, replay evidence, task-local dispatch authority, and isolation are bound to the same routing lease.
Unavailable or source-only runtime material, missing replay evidence, or unobserved route and answer outcomes cannot be laundered into runtime, routing-quality, support, or deployment claims.

open_evidence_gaps: The post-v2.1 learned router selected 59/60 correct routes and exercised fallback, abstention, and clarification, but all 360 substantive candidates were wrong; the 20 correct outcomes came entirely from non-answer actions on one synthetic six-action workload, one 4B model, one seed, and an internal deterministic evaluator.

The current schemas, fixture harnesses, readiness routes, finite theorem consequences, separable matched workload, and ambiguous narrow result do not establish useful specialist answers, independent evaluation, calibrated selective utility, authority enforcement, interference control, natural multi-model routing, production recovery, MoECOT runtime behavior, or transfer.

Run a preregistered natural and adversarial campaign across heterogeneous current models, specialists, tools, human lanes, capacity states, organizations, and strong matched route policies with joint useful-outcome, selective-risk, authority, privacy, interference, latency, cost, recovery, and residual gates.

Require causal interventions, independent router and evaluator implementations, complete denominators, delayed outcomes, and heterogeneous transfer before any useful-routing or state-of-the-art promotion.

chapters.title: Replaceable Cognitive Substrates: Beyond Transformer Monoculture

handoff_or_recovery_notes: Accepted after the 2026-07-15 distinct-interface review; the chapter owns the Cognitive Kernel ABI and architecture-RSI evidence program, while existing routing, readiness, rollback, recurrence, deliberation, and self-improvement chapters retain their established interfaces.

chapters.problem: The stack can claim replaceability while silently baking Transformer token, state, memory, checkpoint, and serving assumptions into every surrounding layer, making architectural improvement expensive, unsafe, and self-ratifying.
chapters.insufficient: An architecture catalog, parameter-count comparison, asymptotic complexity claim, single benchmark, synthetic recall result, source-reported win, or tiny central model with hidden retrieval/search/tool burden does not establish a simpler, better, safer, or replaceable cognitive substrate.
chapters.core_claim: For an exact task family, consumer, modality, model and state version, memory contract, hardware/runtime, authority and rights envelope, resource budget, evaluator, fallback, rollback, and time horizon, learned cognition should be supplied through a typed Cognitive Kernel ABI whose implementations are admitted only by matched strong baselines, exact state and memory semantics, proposal-versus-effect separation, evaluator independence, complete lifecycle cost, failure and residual retention, checkpoint compatibility, and causal ablation.

mechanism: Place initialize, propose, consume-receipt, checkpoint, restore, cost, capability, architecture identity, state schema, assistance disclosure, and non-claim operations behind a typed Cognitive Kernel ABI.
Keep identity, authority, effects, receipts, provenance, program counters, values, and durable state exact while allowing prediction, relevance, uncertainty, and heuristic proposals to remain latent.
Route reflex, reaction, deliberation, search, and specialist work above the ABI so a route can select one kernel, a composition, or a deterministic primitive without widening authority.
Qualify kernels with equal-active-parameter and equal-total-lifecycle-cost tournaments, matched strong baselines, independent evaluators, adverse controls, rollback, reproduction, and transfer.

Separate recurrent computation from addressable memory by preregistering recurrent-state size, sparse-slot capacity, cache growth, pointer fusion, exact-memory controls, storage, lookup, invalidation, migration, and deletion cost.

For tiny-recursive candidates, preregister canonical single-pass, matched sampling/voting, blank/random/unseen identity, marginal utility by recursion step, learned stopping, and progressive mechanism ablations.
Govern architectural RSI as candidate generation, training, shadowing, canarying, promotion, composition, narrowing, rollback, retirement, and descendant invalidation—not merely weight updates.

Treat OneCell as one falsifiable compact recurrent candidate: shared transition weights, typed state lanes, exact external state, outer branch-preserving search, verified abstraction accumulation, and a frozen-core ratchet.
interfaces: Routing Heads and Specialist Cores consumes qualified kernel capability cards and emits bounded route requests.
Stable Capability Fields owns stable capability identity, qualification state, implementation versions, and lifecycle events.
Capability Replacement and Rollback owns migration, effect-complete restore, descendant invalidation, and retirement transactions.
Virtual Context Memory and memory chapters own exact source, custody, retrieval, and durable-memory contracts rather than delegating them to hidden activations.
Governed Deliberation owns outer search, verifier use, budget allocation, stopping, fallback, and abstention above a kernel proposal interface.
Recursive Self-Improvement Boundaries owns who may propose, evaluate, approve, promote, roll back, and retire architecture candidates.
Integrated Reference Architecture must join one same-task substrate swap and one mixed-kernel trace through evidence, authority, cost, and recovery records.
invariants: A kernel returns proposals and evidence handles; it cannot commit external effects or mint its own authority.
Substrate replacement cannot widen authority, weaken protected predicates, erase residuals, or silently change the evaluation contract.
Every routed result records kernel identity, version, state schema, checkpoint lineage, assistance, evaluator, costs, residuals, and fallback.
Checkpoint migration either preserves every declared exact field under an independently checked adapter or rejects before effect.
Mutable test-time state is versioned, attributable, revocable, inspectable at its declared boundary, and recoverable without treating model weights as the only state.
Deterministic tools, retrieval, search, compilers, adapters, and verifiers are separately credited in quality and cost accounting.
OneCell, KAN, Mamba, Transformer, or any later architecture remains a candidate until the exact qualification packet passes; no name receives architectural privilege.
failure_modes: Transformer monoculture leaks token, KV-cache, positional, and checkpoint assumptions into supposedly neutral stack contracts.
Architecture tourism lists fashionable models without connecting them to exact workloads, failure modes, interfaces, or falsifiers.
Benchmark laundering promotes a source-reported or cherry-picked win without matched data, compute, parameters, wall time, hardware, assistance, or evaluator quality.
Asymptotic laundering substitutes linear or subquadratic notation for end-to-end quality, kernel efficiency, memory traffic, training cost, and lifecycle burden.
Tiny-core laundering hides intelligence and cost in a large adapter, retrieval corpus, deterministic tool, search budget, verifier, or hand-authored skill library.
State amnesia checkpoints model weights but loses optimizer, scheduler, RNG, cache, online memory, adapter, backup, and descendant state.
Latent-exact collapse asks a learned hidden state to preserve identity, authority, receipts, effects, or legal/governance obligations exactly.
Self-ratifying architecture change lets a candidate design or select its own evaluator, training data, acceptance threshold, or promotion record.
Router multiplication adds translation, calibration, maintenance, and correlated-failure burden that exceeds any substrate gain.
Frozen-core theater claims cumulative intelligence when gains come from answer-bearing retrieval, benchmark-authored tools, contamination, or expanding outer compute.
Memory relabeling calls compressed recurrent state an attention replacement without measuring exact recall, then adds growing caches or pointer slots without charging their addressable-memory burden.
Recursion-depth laundering credits nominal recursive steps or a tiny parameter count when task identity, augmentation, sampling, voting, or the first few useful steps supply the result.
chapters.minimal_implementation: A finite Cognitive Kernel ABI transition model and independent Python consumer now exercise one nine-event mixed Transformer-to-selective-state-space-to-KAN-to-fallback trace, proposal/effect separation, exact checkpoint identity, non-increasing authority, revocation, migration compatibility, custody fields, two receipt-bound commits, fifteen rejected cases, and twelve rejecting event mutations. This is schema/transition evidence only: no real Transformer, Mamba, KAN, recurrent, graph, or program-synthesis kernel runs behind the ABI. The first empirical minimum still requires three genuinely different kernels, matched Transformer and simple baselines, equal-active-parameter and equal-total-cost views, natural tasks, state migration and restore over real full-state checkpoints, and independently observed effects. P6 made a full access attempt and ended blocked: Gated DeltaNet-2, Mamba-3, Inkling, and TRM could not be reproduced on the available non-CUDA 16 GB host, OneCell remained unimplemented, and no weaker proxy was relabeled as SOTA; the core claim remains argument.
chapters.beyond_state_of_art: A mature result would compare strong Transformer, recurrent/state-space, long-convolution or test-time-state, tiny-recursive, and exact-search/controller lanes on natural, algorithmic, long-context, continual, multimodal, control, and exact-execution workloads under the same governed ABI. It would separate recurrent compute from fixed, cached, sparse-slot, pointer-routed, exact, and attention memory; freeze task identity, sampling, voting, stopping, and useful-recursion-depth controls; report accepted usefulness, unsafe release, abstention, calibration, extrapolation, latency, memory, energy where measurable, training, search, verification, repair, routing, migration, maintenance, governance, fallback, and failure cost; use independent evaluators and hidden controls; reproduce and transfer results; and causally test whether route diversity, verified abstraction, or frozen-core accumulation reduces future search without hiding external intelligence. No current repository result meets that bar.

chapters.title: Readiness Gates, Residual Escrow, and Quarantine
chapters.problem: Every routable or replaceable capability needs a consumer- and use-specific decision about whether it may enter shadow, canary, qualified, ordinary, diagnostic, quarantined, superseded, or retired operation now, and who owns unresolved obligations afterward.
chapters.insufficient: A benchmark score, source report, schema-valid packet, green aggregate, route match, model agreement, or prior qualification cannot by itself establish current routability because it can omit applicability, failed or waived checks, freshness, evaluator dependence, regression floors, authority and rights ceilings, rollback and fallback, inherited residuals, lineage invalidation, load, delayed effects, and total governance cost.
chapters.core_claim: For an exact versioned target, consumer, use, workload family, authority and rights envelope, and evaluation horizon, readiness should issue an expiring routability lease only from independently owned gate evidence, complete per-check state, preserved regression floors, inherited residual custody, allowed and blocked routes, monitoring, rollback and fallback obligations, and review triggers; failed, stale, waived, quarantined, superseded, retired, or lineage-invalidated targets cannot enter ordinary use, and split, merge, retrain, replace, rollback, and retirement transitions must preserve affected descendants, artifacts, effects, and residual owners.

mechanism: Bind an exact target implementation, capability field, owner, consumer, intended use, workload family, risk, authority and rights envelope, environment, horizon, and fallback obligation.

Freeze a versioned readiness policy and gate catalog before outcome inspection, including per-check applicability, requiredness, attempt state, result state, waiver authority, evidence identity, evaluator, observation time, expiry, and invalidating dependencies.

Collect evidence through its existing owners and separate source reports, schemas, proofs, benchmarks, canaries, runtime receipts, incidents, human reviews, and independent reproductions by role and scope.

Validate evidence provenance, freshness, independence, evaluator adequacy, contamination, coverage, uncertainty, and missingness without converting unknown, skipped, waived, or not attempted into pass.
Preserve benchmark floors, frontier gains, critical vetoes, safety and rights constraints, calibration, load, cost, and delayed outcomes as separate gate dimensions rather than one readiness score.
Import every open, inherited, discovered, disputed, and recurring residual with owner, severity, affected scope, descendants, artifacts, effects, closure evidence, review date, and escalation route.
Compute a consumer- and use-specific readiness vector and calibrated uncertainty over useful success, unsafe release, regression, refusal, recovery, latency, total cost, and residual burden.
Choose candidate, shadow, canary, qualified, ordinary, diagnostic-only, quarantined, superseded, retired, rerun, or rejected state under prospectively fixed decision and abstention rules.
Issue an expiring qualification and routability lease that binds allowed and blocked routes, authority subset, monitoring, fallback, rollback, evidence duty, review trigger, and residual custodian.
Exercise shadow and canary use through existing Routing, Runtime, Human, or Inter-Stack owners while retaining denials, interventions, effects, counterfactuals, costs, and delayed outcomes.
Reassess after monitoring windows, incidents, benchmark or evaluator changes, rights changes, load shifts, model or tool updates, and evidence expiry.
Quarantine failed, stale, compromised, ambiguous, or lineage-invalid targets from ordinary routes while preserving bounded diagnostic access, owner, containment, fallback, and appeal.
Promote, demote, narrow, widen, rerun, or reject only through a new versioned decision whose evidence delta and residual delta are explicit.
Propagate qualification and quarantine transitively through dependencies, descendants, delegated routes, cached artifacts, memories, procedures, and outstanding effects.
For split, merge, retrain, replace, or wrapper changes, map predecessor evidence and residuals explicitly and require new evidence for every non-preserved property.
Invoke rollback, compensation, route withdrawal, artifact recall, or descendant invalidation through their existing owners and record incomplete recovery as residuals.
Retire or supersede only with terminal receipts, successor or fallback ownership, artifact and effect disposition, residual custody, and a rule blocking ordinary reuse.
Replay the complete decision and compare readiness policies on preregistered natural and adversarial lifecycle campaigns with causal ablations, independent reproduction, and transfer.
interfaces: Stable Capability Fields owns exact capability identity, implementation qualification, and substitution boundaries; Readiness owns current use-specific routability state.
Routing consumes allowed and blocked routes, expiry, fallback, and quarantine state but cannot promote a target or widen its lease.
Benchmark Ratchets and evaluators produce floor, frontier, calibration, contamination, and transfer evidence but do not authorize ordinary use.
Claim Ledgers, Evidence Engineering, and Artifact Graphs own claim support, evidence lineage, contradictions, and receipts; a readiness decision does not promote a book claim.
Runtime Adapters, Humans, and Inter-Stack protocols own actual dispatch, effects, denials, interventions, and execution receipts used by canary and monitoring gates.
Security, Privacy, Rights, Legal, and Constitutional owners supply non-compensable ceilings, affected-party duties, incident state, and veto conditions.
Capability Replacement and Rollback owns state restoration, compensation, descendant invalidation, and successor transactions; Readiness decides when those operations are required for routability.
Procedural Memory, Data Engines, and Learning owners preserve procedure, dataset, optimizer, checkpoint, cache, and descendant lineage whose changes expire qualification.
Resource Economics owns capacity, latency, monetary and compute cost, human burden, protected overhead, and cost policy used by readiness comparisons.
Human Collaboration and Tribunal owners provide qualified review, appeal, dispute, override, and residual-custody decisions for consequential gates.
Personal Compute Hives and runtime crosswalks provide node and runtime currentness; reachable or source-reported infrastructure is not readiness.
Release and Publication owners consume readiness and support state as separate inputs and retain independent authority over deployment or public release.
invariants: Every decision binds exact target, field, owner, consumer, use, workload, policy, gate catalog, evaluator, evidence, model, tool, environment, authority, rights, cost, and time versions.
Capability identity, implementation identity, readiness state, route permission, claim support, deployment approval, and public release remain separate.
Every required check records applicability, attempt, result, evidence, evaluator, observation time, expiry, and invalidators; unknown, skipped, waived, unattempted, or expired is never pass.
A waiver records who accepted which risk for which scope and time; it cannot substitute for evidence required by a stronger state.
Critical veto, authority, rights, privacy, security, rollback, and residual-custody failures cannot be averaged away by other scores.
Frontier improvement cannot erase regression floors, failed cases, negative controls, calibration error, unsafe releases, or delayed harm.
Readiness is consumer-, use-, workload-, authority-, environment-, and time-specific; no record implies global or permanent qualification.
Every stronger state requires fresh evidence or a narrower declared scope, never merely fewer records, a renamed target, or a changed denominator.
All open and inherited residuals retain exact owner, severity, affected scope, descendants, artifacts, effects, closure condition, and next review.
Quarantine blocks ordinary routing and preserves only explicit diagnostic routes with least authority, containment, fallback, monitoring, expiry, and appeal.
Qualification expires after any material target, dependency, policy, evaluator, benchmark, authority, rights, environment, workload, or time change.
Split, merge, wrapper, retrain, replacement, rollback, and retirement preserve predecessor evidence and residual lineage and requalify non-preserved properties.
Upstream quarantine, revocation, compromise, or invalidation propagates monotonically to affected descendants until a new gate establishes recovery.
Shadow, canary, diagnostic, and ordinary routes retain complete denials, interventions, failures, effects, costs, human work, and delayed outcomes in denominators.
Rollback or compensation readiness requires prospective authority, complete state and effect inventory, tested handles, and explicit non-restorable residuals.
Retired and superseded targets cannot regain ordinary routes without a new identity-bound qualification and explicit residual migration.
Replay reconstructs the frozen decision inputs, checks, state route, lease, evidence delta, residual delta, and nondeterminism without claiming identical real-world outcomes.
Readiness language never exceeds the exercised target, consumer, use, workload, evaluator, authority, environment, organization, threat, cost, and time envelope.
failure_modes: Score laundering collapses readiness into one benchmark, aggregate, schema, proof, route score, model vote, or source-reported status.
Skipped-as-green converts missing, unknown, not applicable, unattempted, or infrastructure-blocked checks into success.
Waiver laundering uses accepted risk or reviewer override as evidence that the waived property passed.
Stale qualification survives target, dependency, policy, evaluator, benchmark, authority, rights, environment, workload, or time change.
Residual erasure drops failed cases, inherited debt, disputed obligations, delayed effects, or closure owners during promotion.
Floor laundering reports frontier gain while regressions, critical vetoes, calibration error, unsafe releases, or cost deterioration are hidden.
Selective-readiness laundering treats abstention, fallback, clarification, or refusal activation as useful readiness while substantive utility remains absent.
Evaluator capture lets the target, developer, shared model, shared data, or shared organization define and certify its own gates.
Authority or rights laundering grants ordinary use beyond the target, principal, affected-party, privacy, locality, budget, or approval ceiling.
Quarantine theater labels a target quarantined while ordinary aliases, descendants, caches, procedures, tools, or wrappers remain routable.
Over-quarantine suppresses useful bounded diagnostic or canary work and hides false-positive, human-burden, latency, and opportunity costs.
Lineage laundering renames, wraps, splits, merges, retrains, or replaces a target without inherited failures, evidence, and residuals.
Recovery theater declares rollback or compensation ready without complete model, optimizer, scheduler, RNG, cache, artifact, effect, backup, and descendant state.
Terminal-state leakage lets retired or superseded targets, credentials, artifacts, memories, routes, or descendants re-enter ordinary use.
Load blindness preserves qualification while contention, latency, cost, failure rate, or route concentration changes the operating regime.
Denominator erasure drops denials, failed canaries, unavailable routes, human repair, retries, delayed harms, residuals, and non-events.
Replay theater preserves a tidy decision packet while omitting nondeterminism, interventions, effects, invalidators, costs, lineage, or residual custody.
State-of-the-art theater generalizes from finite fixtures, a currentness import, synthetic calibration, or zero unsafe releases with negligible useful throughput.
chapters.minimal_implementation: Four public record schemas; four valid and five invalid readiness/residual scenarios; one quarantined six-project check-lifecycle record and nine invalid mutations; six valid lifecycle transitions and twelve invalid controls; one exact Project Theseus YELLOW currentness import with eight negative controls; bounded post-v2.1 and post-v2.3 calibration failures; two accepted no-promotion readiness/residual transition records; and twenty Lean declarations classified as eight direct predicate/projection checks, eleven derived finite route or negative consequences, and one authored-summary bridge. No deployed readiness engine, live residual ledger, useful specialist-answer gate, independent evaluator, natural multi-model lifecycle campaign, production quarantine routing, effect-complete rollback, terminal-state governance, MoECOT replay, or transfer result is established.
chapters.beyond_state_of_art: The mature readiness control plane is a consumer- and use-specific, expiring routability market tested through preregistered natural and adversarial lifecycle campaigns over real current models, specialists, tools, procedures, human lanes, local and remote runtimes, updates, incidents, load shifts, rights changes, and delayed effects. It compares score-only, benchmark-only, static-checklist, confidence-only, human-only, conservative-denial, ordinary MLOps, and full governed policies under matched evidence, authority, resources, evaluators, retries, and time. Joint gates cover useful throughput, unsafe release, false promotion and quarantine, regression, calibration, coverage, rights and authority violations, rollback and compensation, residual survival, lineage propagation, latency, compute and money, human work, recovery, and total lifecycle cost. Prospectively fixed interventions isolate check completeness, freshness, independent evaluation, floor preservation, residual escrow, selective actions, quarantine, transitive invalidation, load awareness, rollback readiness, and terminal closure. Independent implementations must reproduce and transfer conclusions across models, tasks, tools, organizations, rights regimes, threats, capacity states, lifecycle events, and time. Current finite fixtures and narrow negative results define the failure boundary; they are not readiness efficacy or state-of-the-art results.

codex_tests.result_status: passes three exact suites, 40 routes, seven reachable stages, and 45/45 rejecting mutations; one ordinary release, quarantine, and terminal closure remain separate; support-state effect none; no evaluator adequacy, calibration, natural usefulness, effect-complete rollback, deployed quarantine/revocation, transfer, or support claim

proof_targets.target: A reachable readiness lifecycle preserves exact capability, implementation, model-state, workload, baseline, evaluator, policy, authority, consumer, fallback, and residual custody from candidate through acknowledged terminal closure while separating ordinary release, quarantine, support, and external effects.

Missing workload, baseline, evaluator, non-claims, fresh shadow evidence, regression floor, residual escrow, fallback, rollback, monitoring, canary outcome accounting, independent evaluation, transfer, delayed outcomes, transitive quarantine, route blocking, or terminal revocation custody blocks lifecycle progress.

The independent consumer preserves three exact readiness suites, all forty lifecycle routes, the six-receipt terminal witness, and forty-five rejecting identity, gate, replay, and authority-leak mutations without assigning support or external effects.

open_evidence_gaps: Current positive evidence is finite record discipline plus one exact Project Theseus YELLOW currentness observation; post-v2.1 released only 2/36 useful candidates and missed its rollback threshold, the ambiguous router produced zero correct substantive candidates out of 360, and the post-v2.3 pressure campaign emitted zero admissible final decisions out of 24.

Eight direct predicate/projection checks, eleven derived finite consequences, and one authored-summary bridge do not establish evaluator adequacy, gate calibration, useful throughput, live residual custody, production quarantine enforcement, effect-complete rollback, terminal closure, or transfer.

Run a preregistered natural lifecycle campaign across multiple strong current models, specialists, tools, human lanes, updates, incidents, rights changes, load states, and delayed outcomes with strong matched baseline readiness policies and complete useful-throughput, unsafe-release, false-promotion, false-quarantine, recovery, cost, human-work, and residual denominators.

Require prospective causal interventions, independent gate and evaluator implementations, live residual storage, transitive quarantine, effect-complete rollback and compensation, terminal-state enforcement, MoECOT/runtime replay where claimed, and heterogeneous transfer before any readiness-efficacy or state-of-the-art promotion.

chapters.title: Personal Compute Hives and Federated Edge Intelligence

handoff_or_recovery_notes: sources/inbox/personal_compute_hives_browser_note_2026-06-25/

chapters.problem: A governed ASI stack needs an owned, inspectable compute substrate that can place work across personal, family, project, and rented nodes while preserving exact principal, use, data, tool, locality, rights, cost, energy, effect, evidence, revocation, recovery, and residual boundaries under churn and network partition.
chapters.insufficient: Cloud-only assistants centralize control and exposure; single-device systems strand capacity and continuity; and ordinary overlay networks, clusters, volunteer-compute systems, workflow engines, and generic schedulers optimize connectivity or throughput without jointly proving lawful admission, least-authority placement, family and project role separation, partition-safe revocation, effect-complete recovery, and evidence-faithful lifecycle accounting.
chapters.core_claim: For an exact versioned principal, household or project, job, use, data and tool class, effect envelope, acceptance test, risk budget, deadline, and evaluation horizon, a Personal Compute Hive should admit and place work only through policy-before-optimization: independently attested participants and roles, intersected authority and rights, task-local context and execution leases, least-authority adequate node selection, scoped approval, monitored sandboxed execution, complete artifact/effect/resource receipts, partition-aware denial or quarantine, and effect-complete rollback or residual custody; reachability, ownership, cheap capacity, a passing record schema, or stale authority alone cannot license execution, and federation, dropout, revocation, replacement, requeue, and retirement must preserve affected descendants and residual owners.

mechanism: Freeze the exact principal, household or project, job, use, acceptance predicate, risk budget, cost and energy budget, deadline, and evaluation horizon before placement.

Inventory principals, portals, workers, stores, authority services, tools, datasets, effects, external providers, and evaluators as distinct participants rather than treating a reachable device as one undifferentiated node.
Attest participant identity, owner or guardian, role, physical and network location, capability, software and policy version, security posture, readiness, and currentness.
Classify every job's data, tool, physical-effect, network, rights, privacy, locality, verification, and retention obligations before node discovery or bidding.
Compile the request into a typed job contract and task-local context lease that disclose permitted inputs, effects, outputs, evidence, expiry, revocation, fallback, rollback, and residual ownership.

Prefilter candidate nodes by identity, role, data class, tool authority, rights, locality, security, readiness, cost and energy ceilings, and required verifier before any optimization score is computed.
Construct comparable capability, load, latency, bandwidth, battery, thermal, energy, monetary cost, privacy-exposure, reliability, and dropout features only for eligible nodes.
Solicit signed, expiring job bids after policy filtering and retain both eligible and rejected-candidate evidence.
Choose the least-authority adequate lawful node on a preregistered joint objective, or record a justified abstention, escalation, local-only fallback, or deviation from the preferred route.
Obtain task-bound human, guardian, multi-party, spending, physical-effect, or federation approvals when the compiled risk envelope requires them.
Issue a task-local execution or federation lease with exact subject, node, data, tools, effects, network scope, sandbox, verifier, expiry, revocation, and no-delegation constraints.
Transfer only permitted data or opaque handles, never ambient memory, credentials, network visibility, or standing authority.
Execute through a governed runtime adapter that enforces the lease and emits monitored action, artifact, effect, resource, and anomaly events.
On partition, stale authority, dropout, revocation, or policy drift, deny or quarantine high-impact mutation, require a fresh authority receipt, and preserve explicit no-mutation evidence.
Collect content-addressed artifact, effect, approval, cost, energy, latency, audit, verifier, recovery, and residual receipts with complete denominators.
Rollback, requeue, compensate, or quarantine affected work and invalidate descendants when execution, evaluation, authority, node state, or evidence becomes invalid.
Update scoped node reliability, readiness, and reputation from adjudicated evidence without creating standing authority or erasing failures, dissent, and residuals.
Replay natural and adversarial campaigns against matched baselines and transfer settings before promoting scheduler, safety, privacy, availability, efficiency, or federation claims.
interfaces: Intent, Contracts, and Planning own exact purpose, acceptance predicates, decomposition, dependency order, risk, budgets, deadlines, and re-contract triggers.
VCM and Context Engineering own task-local context selection, taint, source binding, locality, materialization, expiry, revocation, and non-authority boundaries.
Routing, Stable Capability Fields, and Readiness own candidate qualification, consumer-specific readiness, least-authority route selection, fallback, quarantine, and lifecycle invalidation.
Security, Privacy, Rights, Legal, and Constitutional layers own identity, consent, guardian and affected-party rights, data/tool/network membranes, secrets, retention, and jurisdiction constraints.
Runtime Adapters, Tools, and Physical Effects own lease enforcement, sandboxing, side effects, monitoring, stop paths, and effect receipts.
Humans, Labor OS, Family Governance, and Tribunals own approval, escalation, contestability, accessibility, remedy, override, and operator workload.
Resource Governance owns capacity, battery, thermal, energy, bandwidth, money, human attention, burst, scarcity, and complete cost attribution.
Artifact Graphs, Evidence, and Claim Accounting own artifact identity, lineage, evaluator output, negative results, evidence transitions, descendant invalidation, and residual custody.
Procedural Memory, Data Governance, and Learning own reuse, reputation updates, contamination controls, retention, deletion, unlearning, and non-authority of learned state.
Inter-Stack and Hive Federation own cross-hive identity, lease negotiation, sandbox manifests, payment or credit, dispute, revocation, partition reconciliation, and exit.
Project stewards and external providers own project-specific job admission, publication and licensing boundaries, infrastructure custody, incident handling, and handback.
Release and Deployment own versioned rollout, canary scope, monitoring, rollback readiness, decommissioning, public non-claims, and terminal retirement.
invariants: Every admission and result is bound to exact versions of principal, household or project, job, use, policy, data, tool, node, runtime, evaluator, acceptance predicate, and horizon.
Network reachability, physical possession, ownership, prior trust, or cheap capacity never implies identity, authorization, data access, or execution authority.
Principal, portal, worker, store, authority service, evaluator, and external provider remain separately identified roles with no implicit privilege inheritance.
Policy and readiness filtering always precede bidding, scoring, optimization, speculative execution, or data transfer.
Effective authority is the intersection of principal, job, data, tool, node, runtime, rights, approval, budget, locality, and temporal ceilings; composition cannot increase it.
Data remains within its permitted locality and disclosure class, and any cross-node movement is explicit, minimal, purpose-bound, and receipted.
Secrets and standing credentials remain opaque handles mediated by a trusted boundary rather than strings in prompts, logs, bids, artifacts, or model context.
Human, guardian, multi-party, spending, and physical-effect approvals are informed, task-bound, revocable, expiring, and separable from mere portal interaction.
External or rented work receives only an isolated task slot with explicit sandbox, network, data, effect, verifier, cleanup, expiry, and revocation boundaries.

Under partition or stale authority, high-impact mutation fails closed or quarantines until a fresh receipt exists; safe stale-tolerant work is separately classified and no-mutation evidence is retained.
Baseline and candidate routes receive matched information, resources, retries, authority, evaluators, time, and stopping rules unless a deviation is disclosed and analyzed.

Every metric includes attempted, admitted, executed, completed, failed, abstained, escalated, dropped, rolled back, and missing cases so routing or availability cannot be improved by denominator deletion.
Latency, compute, bandwidth, battery, thermal load, energy, money, human approval, verification, recovery, and governance work are attributed per job and per lifecycle, not hidden in another layer.
Dropout, cancellation, lease expiry, node loss, and partial output preserve recoverable state, requeue or compensation status, cleanup duties, and a named residual owner.
Revocation, rollback, replacement, and retirement propagate through affected jobs, artifacts, caches, descendants, routes, approvals, credentials, and external effects.
Family and child-facing operation preserves dignity, data minimization, age-appropriate explanation, affected-party rights, appeal, and minimal logging; safety does not license ambient surveillance.
Replay records capture nondeterminism, environment, node state, policy, authority, data, resource conditions, evaluator version, missing artifacts, and irreproducible boundaries.

Record-shape validation, finite theorem consequences, synthetic fixtures, imported metadata, and adjacent tool capability are never described as deployed scheduler, security, privacy, availability, efficiency, federation, or safety proof.
failure_modes: Botnet or malware conversion: enrolled nodes execute untrusted or self-propagating work outside the task lease.
Surveillance conversion: family, safety, productivity, or reliability telemetry becomes ambient behavioral monitoring or coercive control.
Data exfiltration: private, family, project, licensed, or secret material reaches a rented, public, compromised, or overbroad node.
Wrong-node placement: a capable route violates locality, tool, physical-risk, battery, thermal, quiet-hour, accessibility, rights, or approval constraints.
Identity or guardian confusion: child, guest, agent, project, owner, operator, device, or service identities are conflated and authority crosses principals.
Memory swamp: artifacts, logs, models, caches, replicas, and personal data accumulate without provenance, retention, deletion, revocation, or residual custody.
Optimizer-before-policy: cost, latency, availability, reputation, or accelerator preference silently determines eligibility.
Stale-grant dispatch: cached approval or authority continues through revocation, policy change, partition, clock skew, or lease expiry.
Partition availability laundering: unsafe mutation is counted as availability, denial lacks no-mutation proof, or reconciliation silently accepts conflicting effects.
Sandbox theater: declared isolation omits network discovery, credentials, persistence, side channels, cleanup, nested delegation, or physical effects.
Secret materialization: handles are resolved into prompts, logs, artifacts, caches, bids, or external provider memory.
Approval fatigue or rubber stamping: prompts are too frequent, vague, inaccessible, bundled, coercive, stale, or detached from actual effects.
Energy or cost laundering: battery wear, thermal load, bandwidth, electricity, cloud spend, operator time, verification, and recovery are excluded from efficiency claims.
Dropout loss: node departure, sleep, network failure, cancellation, or lease expiry loses work, duplicates effects, strands data, or leaves no residual owner.
Federation authority creep: temporary project or external access becomes standing network visibility, data access, tool authority, reputation, or onward delegation.
Evaluator, reputation, or bidding corruption: collusion, self-report, sybil identity, shared failure, gaming, poisoning, or selective logging causes unsafe placement or promotion.
Offline or inaccessible residuals: failures, disputed effects, cleanup duties, revocations, costs, and missing artifacts vanish when a node or provider leaves.
SOTA theater: synthetic record checks, finite proofs, imported reports, or a favorable single metric are promoted as useful, secure, private, available, efficient, or superior hive behavior.
chapters.minimal_implementation: The current minimum is seven public record schemas with valid fixtures; a hive-admission harness with two valid and eight expected-invalid synthetic records; a partitioned-authority fixture with three valid and six expected-invalid records; one accepted no-change evidence transition; and twenty-six Lean declarations classified as four direct predicate or projection checks, twenty-one derived finite route or negative consequences, and one authored-summary fixture bridge. These artifacts exercise record shape, selected admission and partition routes, finite consequences, and non-promotion boundaries only; they do not run a live scheduler, registry, portal, authority service, network overlay, rented-node sandbox, federation, partition, dropout recovery, energy meter, privacy or security evaluation, or useful-work campaign.
chapters.beyond_state_of_art: A mature Personal Compute Hive campaign preregisters natural household, accessibility, workshop, project, local-model, storage, CI, public-data, rented-compute, intermittent-connectivity, and emergency workloads plus adversarial identity, bidding, partition, revocation, exfiltration, sandbox, dropout, cost, energy, evaluator, and family-governance cases. It compares single-device, cloud-only, manual placement, local-only, cost-only, Kubernetes-, Nomad-, or Ray-like orchestration, conservative denial, and the full governed hive under matched information, authority, resources, evaluators, retries, and time. Joint gates cover useful task success, unsafe execution, false denial, authority and rights violations, privacy exposure, data locality, availability and consistency by job class, latency, bandwidth, compute, battery, thermal load, energy, money, human approval and recovery work, security incidents, rollback and compensation, residual survival, and total lifecycle burden. Prospectively fixed ablations isolate role separation, context leases, policy-first filtering, least-authority selection, scoped approval, sandboxing, fresh-authority receipts, partition quarantine, complete receipts, effect-complete recovery, reputation non-authority, and lifecycle invalidation. Independent implementations must reproduce and transfer conclusions across devices, networks, models, tools, data classes, households, projects, providers, jurisdictions, threats, failures, and time. Current fixtures and finite proofs define a control vocabulary and negative boundary; they are not evidence of hive efficacy or state-of-the-art performance.

proof_targets.target: A reachable Hive lifecycle preserves exact job, principal, contract, registry, candidate-set, selected-node, policy, authority, lease, evaluator, consumer, and residual custody from policy binding through acknowledged closure while separating dispatch, useful-outcome, recovery, support, and external-effect accounting.
Incomplete identity, data, tool, approval, registry, candidate-denominator, least-authority, locality, budget, energy, or dropout policy blocks selection before optimization.
A high-risk Hive job cannot execute without a bound approval receipt tied to the exact job and lease.
External Hive access cannot receive a lease without federation, sandbox, scope, evidence-obligation, expiration, and revocation custody bound to the selected node.
The independent consumer preserves all forty-seven policy, selection, lease, partition, execution, reconciliation, recovery, revocation, and closure outcomes.
Partitioned stale authority quarantines before mutation only with denial and no-mutation evidence; otherwise the lifecycle requests evidence and never infers deployed partition tolerance or support.

open_evidence_gaps: The current evidence is seven public record schemas, two valid and eight invalid hive-admission fixtures, three valid and six invalid partitioned-authority records, one accepted no-change transition, and twenty-six finite Lean declarations; it establishes record and route discipline only, not useful scheduler, registry, portal, authority-service, network, sandbox, federation, recovery, privacy, security, availability, efficiency, or safety behavior.

A full attempt still requires a live governed reference slice across at least two owned node classes and one isolated external-node class, with real typed jobs, policy-before-optimization, task-local context and execution leases, approval, sandbox enforcement, partition and revocation handling, artifact/effect/resource receipts, dropout recovery, cleanup, descendant invalidation, and residual custody.

A preregistered natural and adversarial campaign must compare strong matched single-device, cloud, manual, local-only, cost-only, ordinary-orchestrator, conservative-denial, and full-hive baselines on the joint useful, unsafe, denial, authority, rights, privacy, locality, availability, consistency, latency, bandwidth, compute, battery, thermal, energy, money, human-work, recovery, security, and residual frontier with causal ablations.

Any efficacy, security, privacy, availability, efficiency, or state-of-the-art claim remains blocked until an independently implemented evaluator reproduces the full campaign and transfer tests span devices, networks, models, tools, data classes, households or projects, providers, jurisdictions, threats, lifecycle events, and time; adjacent substrate sources and the CAP theorem remain comparators, not implementation evidence.

chapters.title: Compact Generative Systems: Generate, Verify, Repair, and Residual Honesty

handoff_or_recovery_notes: Folded generate-verify-repair-compression into this destination chapter on 2026-06-30 through the conservative compression merge; preserve GVR receipt states, exactness/repair/fallback accounting, consumer policy, proof hooks, tests, source mappings, and history.

Folded semantic-representation-and-tree-structured-models into this destination chapter on 2026-06-30 as a Semantic Representation Leasing section; preserve semantic node records, grounding/adequacy/interoperability gates, proof hooks, fixtures, source mappings, restoration conditions, and history.

chapters.problem: A compact representation can reduce visible bytes, tokens, parameters, or steps while increasing generation search, verification, repair, metadata, semantic loss, interface work, fallback, human review, governance, recovery, and residual burden; the stack needs a consumer-specific way to distinguish real total-burden reduction from displaced complexity.
chapters.insufficient: Seed length, compression ratio, model size, exact reconstruction on one toy, a clean semantic graph, a proof over authored fixture fields, or a passing verifier cannot establish useful compression: each can hide corpus selection, generator and decoder cost, verifier error, repair and fallback frequency, source and provenance loss, consumer-policy mismatch, delayed downstream harm, and human or governance work.
chapters.core_claim: For an exact versioned source artifact or state, consumer and use, reconstruction or semantic-adequacy contract, allowed loss, authority and rights envelope, workload distribution, cost boundary, and evaluation horizon, a compact representation should be admitted only when its generator, search, metadata, semantic lease, verifier, repair, fallback, interface, human, governance, recovery, and residual burdens are fully attributed; exactness or scoped loss is independently checked against the consumer contract; source lineage, supersession, and fallback remain executable; and the selected representation improves a preregistered joint utility-and-total-burden frontier over strong matched literal, standard codec, model-compression, retrieval, and semantic baselines. Smaller storage, tokens, parameters, or a finite fixture alone establishes neither useful compression nor semantic adequacy, and any hidden, moved, deferred, or discharged burden must retain state, evidence, owner, due condition, descendants, and reopening triggers.
mechanism: Freeze the exact source artifact or state, consumer and use, reconstruction or semantic-adequacy predicate, allowed loss, authority and rights, workload, baselines, budgets, and horizon before searching for a compact form.

Inventory literal data, standard codec state, generator, decoder, search, seed, rules, model weights, prompts, retrieval indexes, metadata, semantic nodes, repair streams, fallback artifacts, evaluators, humans, and downstream consumers separately.

Bind every candidate to exact source lineage, corpus membership, representation and codec version, environment, nondeterminism, consumer policy, permitted uses, expiry, supersession, and descendant scope.
Generate candidates through a bounded, receipted search whose attempted, failed, rejected, timed-out, and selected forms all remain in the denominator.

Compute proxy storage or rate only as a diagnostic, then serialize the complete candidate package including generator, dependencies, metadata, semantic leases, verifier, repair, fallback, and decoding instructions.
Reconstruct through an independently specified decoder and compare exact artifacts byte-for-byte or apply a preregistered scoped-loss and semantic-adequacy contract.
Evaluate verifier correctness and independence with positive, negative, mutation, collision, adversarial, and shared-dependency controls rather than treating verifier acceptance as truth.
Record generated regions, mismatches, missing constraints, repair residuals, semantic uncertainty, source gaps, and consumer-specific invalidity without allowing repair to hide in a success metric.
Execute repair or literal/full-context fallback and attribute its frequency, latency, compute, memory, energy, money, human work, and effect on downstream utility.

Lease semantic nodes, graph paths, tree summaries, and semantic tokens only with provenance, grounding state, adequacy scope, interoperability, uncertainty, permitted uses, expiry, supersession, and source fallback.
Test hierarchy revision, collision, ambiguous address, stale node, source change, and consumer migration while preserving prior references and invalidating affected descendants.
Run real downstream consumers such as retrieval, planning, proof, citation, audit, code, training, and human explanation rather than inferring utility from reconstruction or compactness alone.

Maintain a residual ledger whose accepted, deferred, moved, discharged, erased, reopened, and disputed burdens retain evidence, owner, due condition, workload context, descendant scope, and append-only history.

Compare total burden against literal, standard lossless/lossy codec, quantization/distillation/low-rank, retrieval, summary-tree, learned-generator, and human-maintained semantic baselines under matched resources.
Measure useful task success, fidelity, selective coverage, rate, end-to-end latency, compute, memory, energy, money, human and governance work, fallback, recovery, and residual burden jointly.

Ablate search bounds, independent verification, repair, fallback, semantic provenance, consumer policy, final serialization, residual ownership, and descendant invalidation to test claimed causal signatures.
Quarantine, narrow, retire, or restore the full artifact when exactness, adequacy, utility, total-burden, rights, authority, replay, or residual gates fail.

Reproduce through independent codec, verifier, evaluator, and consumer implementations and transfer across corpora, modalities, models, tasks, organizations, rights regimes, hardware, threats, and time before promotion.
interfaces: Source and Artifact owners provide exact artifact identity, corpus membership, lineage, licensing, retention, and source-of-truth fallback.
Intent, Contracts, and Consumers own the exact use, acceptance predicate, allowed loss, utility target, risk, deadline, and re-contract triggers.
VCM, Memory, Retrieval, and Context Engineering own materialization, taint, source binding, semantic pages, cache invalidation, and full-context fallback.
Routing, Readiness, and Stable Capability Fields own candidate qualification, consumer-specific representation selection, expiry, quarantine, replacement, and fallback routes.
Evidence, Verification, Claim Ledgers, and Benchmarks own evaluator qualification, fidelity and utility evidence, negative results, evidence transitions, and anti-Goodhart controls.
Procedural Memory, Cognitive Compilation, and Learning own promotion into reusable procedures or learned state, contamination controls, regressions, and non-authority of compression success.
Resource Governance owns complete storage, bandwidth, latency, compute, memory, energy, money, human, verification, repair, fallback, and governance accounting.
Security, Privacy, Rights, Legal, and Constitutional owners constrain source exposure, semantic leakage, licenses, identity, secrets, retention, deletion, and affected-party rights.
Runtime Adapters and Tools own decoder, generator, verifier, repair, fallback, sandbox, effect, monitoring, stop, and recovery enforcement.
Artifact Graphs and Residual Ledgers own package identity, dependencies, replay, repair lineage, supersession, descendants, burden custody, reopening, and discharge receipts.
Humans and Tribunals own review, accessibility, explanation, contestation, remedy, override, and the burden that automation displaces to people.
Release, Deployment, and Inter-Stack owners govern representation publication, compatibility, migration, external exchange, rollback, retirement, and public non-claims.
invariants: Every result is bound to exact source, corpus, consumer, use, contract, representation, codec or generator, decoder, verifier, evaluator, environment, policy, and horizon versions.
Literal, encoded, generator, model, prompt, index, metadata, semantic lease, verifier, repair, fallback, and decoder burdens remain separate and are all counted.
Search budgets and denominators include every attempted, rejected, failed, timed-out, manually repaired, and missing candidate; selection cannot erase search cost.
Proxy rate, seed size, model size, token count, or parameter count never substitutes for complete final serialized size and end-to-end lifecycle burden.
Exactness requires independent decode and exact comparison; lossy or semantic use requires an explicit consumer-specific loss and adequacy contract.
Verifier acceptance is evidence only within its tested scope and disclosed dependencies; a candidate cannot solely define or judge its own adequacy.
Repair and fallback remain executable, versioned, measured, and inside the selected representation's cost and utility denominator.
Residual burden can be accepted, deferred, moved, discharged, reopened, or disputed only with state, evidence, owner, due condition, workload context, descendants, and receipt.
No burden is declared absent, erased, or discharged while an unresolved obligation, hidden cost, missing artifact, or affected descendant remains.
Semantic nodes, paths, summaries, and tokens are grounded or labeled speculative and never become independent source, proof, citation, audit, or authority objects.
Semantic use is bounded by provenance, grounding, adequacy, interoperability, uncertainty, permitted use, consumer policy, expiry, and source fallback.
Hierarchy, address, source, or representation change preserves prior references or records supersession, migration, invalidation, and affected descendants.
Matched baselines receive the same source data, consumer tasks, resources, authority, evaluator, retry budget, and horizon unless a disclosed intervention requires otherwise.
Useful downstream task quality and selective coverage remain separate from reconstruction fidelity, storage rate, latency, and verifier pass rate.
Total burden includes storage, bandwidth, search, decode, verification, repair, metadata, interface, compute, memory, energy, money, human work, governance, fallback, recovery, and residuals.
Negative, null, larger-than-literal, utility-damaging, failed-fallback, and ungrounded results remain append-only and cannot be removed from comparisons.
Support, readiness, deployment, and release states change only through their own accepted transitions; compactness or a finite proof grants no authority.
Claims remain scoped to tested corpora, modalities, consumers, loss contracts, models, hardware, evaluators, threats, and time; independent reproduction and transfer are never inferred.
failure_modes: False lossless or exact claims hide mismatches, nondeterminism, platform dependence, missing dependencies, or incomplete comparison.
Residual laundering hides, erases, relabels, indefinitely defers, or moves burden without evidence, owner, due condition, descendants, or reopening trigger.
Utility collapse preserves bytes or reconstruction while degrading the actual retrieval, reasoning, code, proof, audit, training, or human task.
Unbounded or cherry-picked search spends hidden compute and human effort or reports only favorable artifacts and corpora.
Verifier capture, shared bugs, wrong-contract verification, reward hacking, or weak negative controls make acceptance circular.
Repair inflation makes residuals, metadata, verification, or fallback larger, slower, less reliable, or more expensive than the literal baseline.
Fallback theater declares a path that is missing, stale, untested, unauthorized, lossy, inaccessible, or excluded from latency and utility metrics.
Consumer-policy leakage lets previews, summaries, lossy reconstructions, or semantic nodes feed proof, citation, audit, benchmarks, training, or effects without a stronger receipt.
Proxy-rate or package-boundary drift erases apparent savings after final serialization, dependencies, decoder, indexes, metadata, and checksums are counted.
Source or rights laundering drops provenance, licensing, consent, retention, deletion, taint, or affected-party constraints during compaction.
False explainability cites a clean semantic path or summary instead of the source, proof, test, uncertainty, or counterevidence it indexed.
Canonical graph capture turns an editable representation into an unreviewed source of truth or execution authority.
Hierarchy, address, collision, or migration drift leaves downstream consumers using stale, ambiguous, superseded, or incompatible meanings.
Semantic laundering hides uncertainty, provenance loss, collision risk, grounding failure, task-specific inadequacy, or non-interoperability behind compact tokens.
Recursive accounting instability lets a compact structure modify its generator, verifier, success metric, residual ledger, or consumer policy without separate governance.
Resource laundering excludes search, decode, bandwidth, memory, energy, money, human review, governance, recovery, or opportunity cost.
Denominator and benchmark gaming omit failures, fallback, unavailable consumers, longer artifacts, model weights, cached state, or adverse workloads.
SOTA theater promotes one toy exact reconstruction, one source-reported gain, a finite theorem, or a ratio win as useful, general, secure, semantic, or superior compression.
chapters.minimal_implementation: The current minimum contains six retained finite countermodels plus a seventeen-declaration, nine-stage, sixty-route source-to-closure lifecycle; an independent consumer that rejects 51/51 non-accepting route mutations and digest-binds the five-case GVR, three-valid/five-invalid conservation, four-entry trace, and four-entry/five-invalid replay results; the exact prior Circle and residual-pressure outcomes; and no support or external effect. Twenty-six assumed projections, fixture normalizations, copied result facts, and summary bridges are retired. This is bounded local policy/conformance evidence, not useful compression, codec correctness, verifier adequacy, semantic grounding, deployed fallback, live residual detection, downstream utility, transfer, or SOTA evidence.
chapters.beyond_state_of_art: A mature compact-representation campaign preregisters heterogeneous natural corpora, modalities, mutable artifacts, semantic and exact consumers, downstream tasks, rights regimes, source changes, hierarchy migrations, failure injections, and delayed outcomes. It compares literal storage, standard lossless and lossy codecs, quantization, distillation, low-rank methods, retrieval and summary trees, learned generators, semantic graphs, human-maintained abstractions, conservative fallback, and the full governed representation market under matched data, resources, evaluators, authority, retries, and time. Joint gates cover exact or scoped fidelity, downstream useful success, selective coverage, final serialized rate, end-to-end latency, search, decode, verification, repair, metadata, interface, compute, memory, bandwidth, energy, money, human and governance work, fallback frequency and success, source and rights preservation, recovery, and residual burden. Prospectively fixed ablations isolate bounded search, independent verification, repair, fallback, semantic provenance, consumer policy, final serialization, residual ownership, and descendant invalidation. Independent codec, verifier, evaluator, and consumer implementations must reproduce conclusions and transfer across corpora, modalities, models, tasks, organizations, hardware, rights regimes, threats, updates, and time. The existing toy exact reconstructions, finite records, authored bridges, and negative pressure result define a valuable boundary; they are not evidence of useful, general, semantic, or state-of-the-art compression.

proof_targets.target: Reachable residualization blocks unresolved obligations lacking record, owner, burden, provenance, cost, or fallback receipt.
Lossy exactness is blocked and failed or mismatched verification requires executable preserved-source fallback.
Nine reachable stages and 60 routes bind representation identities from source through closure.
Independent digest-bound GVR conformance plus reachable verification/fallback semantics replaces copied fixture facts.
Independent digest-bound residual result conformance plus result-substitution and broken-chain closure guards replaces copied summaries.
Observed reconstruction, target identity, verifier identity, and executable fallback are reachable lifecycle obligations.
Failed verification activates preserved-source fallback or blocks progress without promotion authority.
Semantic use requires provenance identity, content, and a grounding evaluator before migration.
Hierarchy changes require migration records, reference continuity, and consumer mapping.
